The '''Teke Ro system''',<ref name="GSWU2">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''</ref> also known as the '''Cona system''',<ref name="GG7">''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]''</ref> located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories, was the location of the [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] homeworld of [[Cona/Legends|Cona]]. The system's sun, [[Teke Ro]], was a blue giant star.

{{System-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
*There is much confusion as to this system's placement. The game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Rebellion'']] places both Cona and [[H'nemthe/Legends|H'nemthe]] in [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]: this is clearly impossible, since ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'' indicate [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], in [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]], is ''in between'' Cona and H'nemthe: thus, they cannot be in the same sector.
*Other sources place Cona in either the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] or the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories.
